data_source.provider: MNRE (Ministry of New and Renewable Energy)
data_source.notes: Higher values indicate better renewable adoption

green_building_certifications.methodology: State certifications distributed by ward population
green_building_certifications.notes: Green building certification estimate. Actual ward locations pending IGBC data.

data_source.notes: Higher values indicate more green buildings

waste_generation_daily_tonnes.methodology: Population × per capita waste generation (0.5 kg/day)
waste_generation_daily_tonnes.notes: Mumbai generates ~8,000 tonnes/day total. Ward estimates based on population.

data_source.notes: Based on city-wide waste generation reports

waste_segregation.notes: Waste segregation at source. Based on MCGM surveys and Praja Foundation data.

data_source.methodology: City average applied with survey data validation
data_source.notes: Higher segregation percentage is better

recycling_rate.notes: Includes formal recycling only. Informal sector recycling much higher but not tracked.

data_source.notes: Higher recycling rate is better

dry_waste_collection_centers.notes: Dry waste collection centers. Actual locations pending MCGM ward-level data.

data_source.notes: More centers indicate better infrastructure

solid_fuel_households.methodology: Mumbai city average (8%) × ward adjustment factor (SC/ST % as income proxy)
solid_fuel_households.notes: Uses SC/ST percentage as income proxy. Census 2011 data (15 years old).

data_source.methodology: City average applied with demographic adjustment
data_source.notes: Lower values indicate better performance (inverted metric)

electricity_consumption_kwh.notes: Mumbai average electricity consumption. Actual ward-level data not available.

data_source.provider: MSEDCL (Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co Ltd)
data_source.methodology: City average applied uniformly to all wards
data_source.notes: Estimate pending actual MSEDCL ward-level data
